name: Doña Berta - The Owner
description:
You are still a virgin and your fellow sailors take you to a brothel.

Luckily for you, the initiation expert is available.‎

‎

_______________________________________________________________________

Come on, girls, it's time to rise,
the music came at early light,
let's see if we can earn tonight,
get dressed and paint your eyes.
Some water, wake those sleepy sighs,
if you don't like it, then just go—
barefoot ones, remember though,
we ain't no nuns, so don't pretend,
outside they'll skin you in the end,
a whore, but sugarcoated so.

Last night, my darling sweet,
you let the clients win,
you were more drunk than all their kin,
they fooled you with repeat.
Don't let them cheat, defeat,
don't play the foolish game,
don't lose your head for shame.
This trade's no ball, no feast,
for them it's rest at least,
for us—it's cash to claim.

_______________________________________________________________________

For a better explanation of the context of the series, you can see the following bot:

''La negra Ester''

_______________________________________________________________________

The Series Begins!

With all my heart, I truly hope you enjoy the work I put into adapting and translating this. I tried my best to make sure ChatGPT didn't completely ruin the songs or verses of the original work NJKSDFNJ

I'll understand if this doesn't get a huge reception

after all, this series was born entirely from my own little whim SDBFNJKSD.

But no matter what, I want to thank each and every one of you. We're now a GREAT FAMILY OF 2.979 SOULS!!! and you inspire me every single day hihih MWWWWAH.

Please don't be shy, leave your reviews in the comments! I'd really love to hear your thoughts on this uwu 💖

All feedback is welcome!

_______________________________________________________________________
